title: Febreze Air Freshener Spray LENOR SPARKLING BLOOM 185ml x 4 | Odour Eliminator with OdourClear Technology | Non-Flammable, Long-Lasting Room Freshener, Exotic Fruity Fragrance
features: 🌸 4 x 185ml Sparkling Bloom Air Mists – A fresh and uplifting floral fragrance for everyday use
💨 OdourClear Technology – Doesn’t mask odours; actively eliminates them for a fresh, clean feel
🍍 Exotic & Uplifting Fragrance – Inspired by tropical fruits for a burst of sweet, juicy freshness
🔥 Propellant-Free & Non-Flammable – Safe for use around the home, including kitchens and bathrooms
🇬🇧 Made in the UK – Trusted Febreze quality, suitable for homes with pets, kids, or sensitive noses
🏠 Versatile Room Use – Ideal for living rooms, kitchens, bathrooms, hallways, and more
description: Enjoy a fresh, floral breeze throughout your home with this Febreze Sparkling Bloom Air Mist 185ml – Pack of 4 . Each spray is infused with OdourClear Technology to truly eliminate everyday odours, not just cover them up. Inspired by blooming flowers and clean air, Sparkling Bloom adds a bright, refreshing touch to any space. Perfect for daily use in kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, or anywhere you want to enjoy a lasting floral scent. 4 x 185ml Febreze Air Mist Sparkling Bloom OdourClear eliminates unwanted smells at the source Gentle floral fragrance refreshes your home Safe, non-flammable, and propellant-free formula Trusted Febreze quality – made for UK homes Febreze – breathe happy with freshness that lasts.
